big_picture: At A$3.01, WAF is priced as a high-risk, single-jurisdiction gold producer with a meaningful probability of operational disruption -- a characterisation that appears increasingly difficult to reconcile with a A$567M NPAT delivered in FY2025 and gold trading at US$5,024/oz.
